candidates.why: Direct top-line revenue label; preferred over other revenue-type lines.
Revenue-like label but less clearly the main top line than Total Revenue.
Lowercase variant appears to be a separate non-top-line item and includes negative values.

variables.notes: Selected the clearest top-line revenue row.
No clear cost of goods sold / cost of sales line is present. Rows like 'Raw Materials' are insufficient to represent total COGS on their own.

candidates.why: Possible overhead component, but less preferable if an explicit operating expense bucket exists.
Possible overhead component, but less preferable if an explicit operating expense bucket exists.
Explicit operating overhead bucket and populated in preview; per rules, select only this row when such a row exists.

variables.notes: Per XSGA hierarchy, selected only the explicit populated overhead row and excluded component rows.

candidates.why: Development cost asset balance, not an R&D expense line.
Development cost asset balance, not an R&D expense line.

variables.notes: No R&D expense line is present on the Income Statement. Balance sheet development cost rows are assets, not expense.

candidates.why: Finance-expense line that could serve as fallback if interest expense is unavailable.
Broader finance-expense line; reasonable fallback for interest expense.
Exact preferred label for interest expense.

variables.notes: Priority list uses the exact interest label first, then broader finance-expense fallbacks.

candidates.row_label: Equity attributable to Parent Companys equity holders
candidates.why: Best semantic match for book equity excluding non-controlling interests.
Total equity includes all equity and is less preferred when parent-only equity exists.
Duplicate total equity label; also less preferred than parent-only equity.

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Total Liability and Equity

candidates.why: Total liabilities and equity, not equity alone.

final_choice.row_label: Equity attributable to Parent Companys equity holders

variables.notes: Preferred parent-attributable equity to avoid double counting with minority interest.

candidates.why: Income statement minority line, but balance sheet NCI is preferred for MIB.
Income statement minority line, but balance sheet NCI is preferred for MIB.
Direct balance sheet minority interest / non-controlling interest label.

variables.notes: Selected the balance sheet minority interest line as the preferred MIB mapping.
